title: avenula aenigmatica
intro: Avenula aenigmatica, also known as the enigmatic oats-grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Avenula aenigmatica include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Avenula aenigmatica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
